release_notes: v1.2.3 - Smoother, more reliable updates. The updater no longer fails with 'Permission denied' in the Temp folder: each update downloads to a fresh file name (a locked leftover can't block it), old leftovers are cleaned up automatically, and a clear message is shown if the Temp folder can't be used. The installer's 'app still running' step no longer traps you behind a pop-up: it waits a few seconds for the app to close and, only if it is still open, shows a front-most window that can close the app for you (with Task Manager guidance) - no Retry/Cancel-only box and no option that could leave a half-updated app. If you see a file-in-use or permission message while updating, press Ctrl+Shift+Esc, end 'ADP_HR_Screener.exe', then click Retry (not Ignore). History, reports, candidate database, and settings are preserved.
